title: cyclodium meniscioides var. rigidissimum
intro: Cyclodium meniscioides var. rigidissimum, also known as Rigid Cyclodium or Rigid Water Clover, is a type of aquatic fern native to East Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Cyclodium meniscioides var. rigidissimum can be prepared as a tea or infused in water to make a medicinal drink, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
